3233520.name: Heart of the Mountains
3233520.description: You are a nomad, a wanderer who is doomed to wander the barren lands in search of treasures. Your main dream is to get rich, leave these impenetrable deserts and find a place where peace and quiet await you. But lately the desert has become more dangerous. Enemies have multiplied like sand under your feet. And you will have to fight for every step to survive. Heart of the Mountains is a 2D platformer where you have to go through many levels. You will fight enemies, look for treasures and try to survive in this barren world! You will find: Exciting gameplay that combines elements of platformer and action. Various enemies. Challenging tasks that will test your skills and reaction.
